sourceSummary.oneLine: User manual for H&abyz G1417/G1717 Series digital flat panel X-ray detector models, including intended use, specifications, wireless operation, maintenance, EMC, labeling, warranty, and revision history.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports setup, operation, maintenance, disposal, and regulatory/EMC information for G1417/G1717 Series detector users.
keyPoints: G1417/G1717 Series are digital flat panel detectors used for screening and diagnosis of disease or injury.
The detectors are intended for qualified or trained doctors or technicians for diagnostic radiographic exposures of multiple body parts.
The detectors are not intended to be used for mammography applications.
The equipment complies with IEC 60601-1-2 EMC standards for medical devices.
Product information identifies the product as a Digital Flat Panel X-Ray Detector manufactured by H&abyz Co., Ltd. in Korea.

reviewFlags.reason: Source metadata authoritySignal is FDA, but the provided source text does not mention FDA; regulatory content instead cites EMC standards, WEEE, EU/EEA, FCC, MIC, and KC wireless regions.
Revision evidence is conflicting: sourcePath indicates Rev.0.1, while the revision history also lists a later Version 0.2 dated 2025-09-30.
Some extracted table text appears flattened by preprocessing, which may reduce precision for table-specific claims.
